---
title: "Lab: Titanic Teaching Example"
---

## Objective

Create a compact, slide-friendly example for subclassification and simple exact matching.

## Design Setup

- Use `causaldata::titanic` as a pedagogic dataset.
- Keep this as a teaching appendix, not a main policy-evaluation example.
- Prioritize visual clarity over methodological depth.

## Planned Analysis Blocks

1. Define treatment and outcome for a transparent classroom contrast.
2. Show baseline imbalance and curse-of-dimensionality intuition.
3. Demonstrate simple exact matching and basic CEM.
4. Present concise interpretation and caveats.

## Implementation Checklist

- [ ] Lock treatment/outcome definitions for teaching use.
- [ ] Add a minimal visual diagnostic set.
- [ ] Add one-page teaching summary suitable for slides.
